description: Route constraints derived from approved candidates in L4-v2 Round B

pressure_range.notes: P2 dominates winners (75%), but P3 also viable (25%)

triage_range.notes: T4 appears in 100% of winners - strong signal

memory_range.notes: M4 appears in 100% of winners - strong signal

F_P2T4M4.notes: Most common winner family, but stability score moderate

F_P3T4M4.notes: High mechanism score but low sample size - needs more data

penalty_outside_range.reasoning: Winners are concentrated in P2/P3, T4, M4 - outside these ranges should be penalized

confidence_reason: Based on only 4 approved candidates - need larger sample for reliable constraints
recommended_action: Run larger evaluation (n=100+) to confirm constraints
